news.headline: Senior Trump Administration Official: Tariffs on China give India an opportunity to strengthen supply chains and expand relations with the US.
MOO Imbalance
HealthStream's CredentialStream products achieve HITRUST r2 Certification for data security. (characters: 84)
news.summary: HealthStream, a prominent healthcare technology platform for workforce solutions, headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, recently shared that its SaaS-based CredentialStream application, in addition to the CredentialStream Hub and Network, obtained HITRUST r2 Certification. This certification signifies the highest level of information security and compliance assurance. CredentialStream, a leading application in the market, is widely adopted by hospitals and health systems for tasks such as credentialing and privileging. HealthStream is listed on the Nasdaq as HSTM.

news.headline: American Rebel Light Beer available online in 40 US states via American Rebel Beer website, working with Bevstack, linking to 1,300 retailers.
news.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) based in Nashville, TN, has launched online ordering of their American Rebel Light Lager to customers in 40 US states through their website americanrebelbeer.com. The company, known for their branded safes, personal security products, and apparel on americanrebel.com, partnered with Bevstack for this expansion. Orders from americanrebelbeer.com are now directed to over 1,300 retailers in the 40 states for seamless in-state shipping and quick delivery. This new initiative opens up a wider market for American Rebel Beer, reaching customers across numerous states.

news.headline: Golar sells LNGC Golar Arctic for $24 million in its exit from LNG shipping. Last LNG carrier in fleet. Transaction to close by Q1 2025.
news.summary: Today, Golar LNG Limited revealed the sale of the Golar Arctic, a 2003 steam turbine LNG carrier, for a total of USD 24 million, excluding transaction expenses. The vessel, which is debt-free, is set to be transferred to its new owner by Q1 2025. This sale marks the departure of Golar from the shipping sector, as the Golar Arctic is the final LNG carrier in its fleet.

news.headline: Global corporate gifting market worth $765.46 billion in 2023, expected to reach $1.65 trillion by 2033 with Amazon leading.
news.summary: A report titled "Corporate Gifting Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global corporate gifting market achieved a value of approximately $765.46 billion in 2023, exhibiting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.64% from 2018. Forecasts suggest that the market will expand to about $1.11 trillion by 2028, representing a growth rate of 7.76% during this period. Further growth is projected beyond 2028, with the market expected to increase at a CAGR of 8.28% and potentially reach $1.6 trillion.

news.headline: Senior Trump Administration Official: I hope to have bilateral trade deal with India in place in 2025.
Synopsys expands hardware-assisted verification portfolio with AMD, Arm, NVIDIA, SiFive. New systems offer industry's fastest performance.
news.summary: Major players in the technology sector such as AMD, Arm, NVIDIA, and SiFive are now utilizing Synopsys' prototyping and emulation technologies. These include the latest offerings, the Synopsys HAPS-200 prototyping and ZeBu-200 emulation systems, which stand out for their top-of-the-line speed. Synopsys continues to lead the way in providing ready-to-use emulation and prototyping solutions, with these new systems offering cutting-edge performance to meet the demands of the industry.

news.headline: Moleculin receives FDA guidance to speed up MIRACLE trial for R/R AML. First subject in Phase 3 by Q1 2025. $MBRX stock.
news.summary: The Company, Moleculin Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBRX), is progressing as planned towards treating the first subject in the pivotal Phase 3 clinical trial named "MIRACLE" in the initial quarter of 2025. Based in HOUSTON, this trial signifies a significant milestone for Moleculin as it moves forward with its late-stage pharmaceutical development. The company's adherence to the timeline indicates a steadfast commitment to advancing medical research and potentially bringing groundbreaking treatments to patients.

news.headline: Global Payments missed Q4 earnings with EPS of $2.95 (+12% cc), below expected $2.96. Plans to deliver over $600M annual run-rate. CEO highlights transformation agenda for business. Sales: $2.289B, missing estimate $2.305B. Adjusted net revenue increased 5% compared to $2.19B in year-ago period.
news.summary: Shares of Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) are down in premarket trading on Thursday following the company's report of fourth-quarter results. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $2.95, indicating a 12% increase in constant currency but falling short of the street's expectation of $2.96. Quarterly sales came in at $2.289 billion, missing the analyst consensus of $2.305 billion. CEO Cameron Bready highlighted 2024 as a significant year for Global Payments as they initiated a transformation agenda to shape the future of the business. Adjusted net revenues saw a 5% increase (6.5% constant currency excluding dispositions) compared to $2.19 billion in the previous year.

news.headline: Unilever warns of slow start to 2025, Ice Cream spin-off progressing with Amsterdam incorporation. Ice Cream division separation expected by end of 2025. Jean-Francois van Boxmeer named Chair Designate.
news.summary: Unilever PLC's (NYSE:UL) stock is experiencing a decline during premarket trading as the company progresses in the separation of its Ice Cream division, aiming to complete the process by the end of 2025. Important steps have been accomplished, including establishing legal entities, constructing an independent operational framework, and finalizing necessary financial separation paperwork. The decision to spin off the Ice Cream division was made last year, with Unilever intending to focus on enhancing a brand portfolio tailored for lucrative markets with compatible business models. The Ice Cream unit features renowned global brands like Wall’s, Magnum, and Ben & Jerry's. Jean-Francois van Boxmeer has been appointed Chair Designate for the independent Ice Cream business due to his vast experience in the consumer goods sector.

news.headline: Datadog's Q4 revenue grew by 25% to $737.73M, beating estimates. EPS of 49 cents exceeded expectations. ARR customers increased by 13%.
news.summary: Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) released its quarterly report showing strong performance. The SaaS platform saw a 25% year-on-year revenue growth, reaching $737.73 million in the fiscal fourth quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $714.54 million. The adjusted EPS stood at 49 cents, exceeding the estimated 44 cents. By December 31, Datadog had 3,610 customers with an ARR of $100,000 or more, marking a 13% increase from the previous year. The adjusted gross margin dropped 100 bps to 82%, while the adjusted operating margin decreased by 400 bps. The market reacted negatively to the report, causing a decline in the stock price.

news.headline: Senior Trump Administration Official: The Trump administration wants to bring down the bilateral trade deficit and ensure fair trade relations with India.
Senior Trump Administration Official: The Trump administration aims to prioritize India as a key importer of America's natural resources.
Craig Catanoso named Senior Strategic Account Director at AMPLIFY, a legal marketing agency, with over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: In Miami on February 13, 2025, a boutique legal marketing agency named AMPLIFY shared the news of Craig Catanoso's appointment as the new Senior Strategic Account Director. Catanoso comes with a wealth of experience, boasting over two decades in the industry. AMPLIFY is renowned for its expertise in video storytelling and brand amplification, making this addition a significant one for the company.

news.headline: Ideal Power Inc. will host Q4 and FY 2024 results call on Feb 27 at 10 AM ET.
news.summary: A tech company based in Austin, Texas, disclosed on February 13, 2025, that Ideal Power Inc. (Nasdaq: IPWR) revealed advancements in their B-TRAN® bidirectional semiconductor power switch. This switch is known for its high efficiency and patented technology.

news.headline: Unanet named to Built In's Best Places to Work 2025 list. People-first culture drives success. (Characters: 91)
news.summary: Unanet, a company based in Dulles, Virginia, has been recognized for its customer-centric approach that contributes to the success of its clients in the government contracting sector. On February 13, 2025, Unanet, a top provider of project-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and customer relationship management (CRM) solutions, continues to drive innovation in the GovCon industry. Their emphasis on prioritizing people over process has led to significant growth, with a growing customer base of over [insert number] clients benefitting from their services.

news.headline: Global Kinase Inhibitors Market to rise from USD 58 billion in 2023 to USD 89.9 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 3.9%, fueled by targeted therapy breakthroughs and cancer prevalence. Leading companies driving market innovation include Pfizer, Novartis, and AstraZeneca.
news.summary: The global kinase inhibitors market is experiencing significant growth, valued at USD 58,090.1 million in 2023 and projected to reach over USD 89,929.8 million by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 3.9%. This growth is driven by advancements in targeted therapies and rising cases of cancer and chronic diseases. Key players in the market include Pfizer Inc., Novartis AG, AstraZeneca plc, and others, who are focusing on innovation and personalized medicine approaches. Competitive landscape is intense with strategic collaborations, product launches, and expansions. Kinase inhibitors are crucial in blocking protein kinase activity, driving targeted therapy growth. Key growth drivers are technological advancements in therapy and increasing cancer and chronic disease cases. The report provides a detailed analysis and market insights on the kinase inhibitors market.

news.headline: HomesToLife Ltd's new subsidiary, HTL Far East, is expected to generate US$12.0-14.0 million revenue in 2025 after receiving US$1.5 million sales orders in January 2025.
news.summary: In Singapore on February 13, 2025, HomesToLife Ltd (Nasdaq: HTLM) revealed that its subsidiary, HTL Far East Pte Ltd, founded in October 2024, achieved sales orders surpassing US$1.5 million in January 2025. Projections indicate the subsidiary is poised to generate revenue ranging from US$12.0 million to US$14.0 million throughout 2025. This growth is attributed to a swift increase in sales triggered by high demand for their products.

news.headline: Unilever plans to list its ice cream unit with three bourses involved.
Martin Marietta Materials reports $1.63 billion Q4 sales, analyst consensus missed. FY25 revenue guidance below estimates.
news.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) released their fourth-quarter financial results, which showed lower revenue than expected. The company reported earnings of $4.79 per share, surpassing the predicted $4.59 per share consensus. However, their quarterly sales were $1.63 billion, falling short of the estimated $1.65 billion. The company's forecast for FY25 revenue was below expectations. CEO Ward Nye mentioned challenges faced in 2024, such as adverse weather conditions, declining construction demand, and stricter monetary policies. These external factors impacted their performance. For more details, visit a financial news website.

news.headline: Reddit Inc's shares dropped after Q4 results - revenue $427.71 million, EPS 36 cents. DAUq up 39% to 101.7 million. U.S. DAUq down to 48 million. Total weekly active users nearly 380 million.
news.summary: Shares of Reddit Inc (NYSE:RDDT) are experiencing a decline today following the release of the company's fourth-quarter financial results. The reported Q4 revenue stood at $427.71 million, surpassing the estimated $405.26 million, while the Q4 EPS was 36 cents, higher than the anticipated 25 cents.The total revenue showed a significant 71% increase year-over-year, with daily active unique users (DAUq) growing by 39% to reach 101.7 million. However, there was a slight decline in U.S. daily actives on a quarter-over-quarter basis, dropping from 48.2 million to 48 million. The company reported a total of nearly 380 million weekly active users in the quarter.The decrease in daily actives in the U.S. appears to be impacting the stock performance negatively. Reddit highlighted in a shareholder letter the volatility experienced with Google. Despite the slide in shares, multiple analysts have raised the price targets for RDDT after the earnings report.

news.headline: American Electric Power misses revenue estimate with $4.70 billion in Q4, but beats profit forecast with $660.1 million, reaffirms 2025 outlook.
news.summary: Correction: AEP released its earnings report on Thursday. American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) disclosed fourth-quarter revenue totaling $4.70 billion, falling short of the expected $4.88 billion. Energy distribution increased by 4.0% Y/Y in the Vertically Integrated Utilities segment and by 10.3% Y/Y in the Transmission & Distribution Utilities segment. Commercial load surged by 10.6% in 2024 due to economic growth in the company’s service region. Adjusted operating earnings climbed to $660.1 million this quarter from $646.9 million last year. Vertically Integrated Utilities saw earnings rise to $275.5 million from $237.8 million, while AEP Transmission Holdco saw an increase to $166.3 million from $159.3 million in the previous year's quarter. The adjusted EPS of $1.24 exceeded the anticipated $1.22. Looking ahead to FY25, American Electric Power reaffirmed its adjusted EPS outlook.

news.headline: Imperial Petroleum Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenues of $26.2M, 12.4% decline from Q4 2023 due to lower spot market rates. Q4 net income was $3.9M, a $2.6M decrease from Q4 2023. Cash equivalents totaled $206.7M by Dec. 31, 2024, a 66.7% increase from the previous year. Fleet operational utilization was 86.0% in Q4 2024. 180% increase in TC days. Total M.R. product tankers is nine. Twelve-month revenue for 2024 dropped to $147.5M, a $36.2M decline from 2023. TWA teked back down after Iran attack on UAE oilFacility.
news.summary: IMPERIAL PETROLEUM INC. announced unaudited financial results for Q4 2024 and 12M 2024. Fleet operational utilization increased to 86.0% in Q4 24' from 68.5% in Q4 23'. Revenues decreased 12.4% to $26.2 million in Q4 24'. Net income was $3.9 million in Q4 24' compared to $6.5 million in Q4 23'. Cash and cash equivalents rose to $206.7 million as of Dec 31, 2024, a 66.7% increase from 2023. For 12M 24', net income was $50.2 million and operating cash flow $77.7 million. Fleet totaled 12 vessels with plans to acquire 7 more. CEO cited a focus on profitable growth. The company's shares trade on Nasdaq. Notable metrics include fleet utilization, charter days, and operational utilization percentages. Adjusted net income and adjusted EBITDA are non-GAAP metrics used for financial assessment. Forward-looking statements and risk factors were also discussed. CEO expressed satisfaction with the company's performance and cash position.

news.headline: Sage launches new conference in Atlanta for SMBs, empowering 5,000 leaders to shape finance and business growth.
news.summary: An event redesigned to empower 5,000 business executives in influencing the trajectory of finance and fostering business expansion.

news.headline: Investors in Ecuador bonds are pulling back due to concerns over potential post-election turmoil.
Generation Mining announces departure of COO Mr. Drew Anwyll, effective Feb 28, 2025. His duties will be taken by existing team members.
news.summary: In Toronto, Generation Mining Limited (TSX: GENM, OTCQB: GENMF) has revealed a shift in its management team by bidding farewell to Mr. Drew Anwyll, the Chief Operating Officer, with this change set to take effect on February 28, 2025. Mr. Anwyll, who has been an integral part of Gen Mining since March 2020, will see his responsibilities transition to current members of the company's technical team. Jamie Levy, President and CEO of Gen Mining, expressed gratitude for Mr. Anwyll's contributions in driving the Company's progress, particularly in relation to the Maratho project.

news.headline: NRSF and NASRO seek SROs using innovative methods to teach safe driving behavior to honor at event. Hoover, Ala. Feb. 13.
news.summary: In Hoover, Alabama on February 13, 2025, The National Road Safety Foundation (NRSF) and The National Association of School Resource Officers (NASRO) are jointly searching for school resource officers (SROs) across the country who are implementing innovative approaches to educate students about safe driving practices. They are inviting nominations for these outstanding SROs who are making a positive impact in promoting road safety among students.

news.headline: Evofem receives new US patent extending SOLOSEC IP to 2040 with broad claims. 100 characters.
news.summary: Evofem Biosciences, Inc. revealed today that it has received an extension of their SOLOSEC intellectual property rights until 2040. This extension includes comprehensive claims that can be included in the Orange Book. The United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) granted the Company a Notice of Approval. This news was announced in San Diego on February 13, 2025. Evofem Biosciences, Inc. operates under the OTCQB symbol EVFM.

news.headline: Big Sky County MLS partners with Land id™ to provide 11-county membership access to real estate research and marketing app.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Bozeman, Montana, the Gallatin Association of Realtors® MLS announced that its 11-county membership will now have access to Land id™, a top map-based real estate research and marketing application. This partnership will enhance real estate professionals' ability to conduct market research and advertising within the region. Land id™, a leading land discovery and marketing software, is expected to provide valuable insights and tools for the real estate industry.

news.headline: PPI data shows lower inflation than CPI. S&P 500 futures rise despite upcoming Trump tariffs, likely keeping Fed on hold.
news.summary: Recent data from the Producer Price Index (PPI) indicates that inflation may not be as severe as originally indicated by the Consumer Price Index (CPI). This news has led to a rise in S&P 500 futures. However, the looming threat of additional tariffs imposed by President Trump is expected to deter the Federal Reserve from making any immediate adjustments. The discrepancy between the CPI and PPI could provide some relief, but uncertainties surrounding trade policies remain a concern for investors and policymakers. It is essential to monitor future developments closely as market dynamics continue to evolve.

news.headline: P&G CFO to speak at Consumer Analyst Group of NY Conference on Feb. 20 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Webcast available at www.pginvestor.com for replay.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Andre Schulten, the Chief Financial Officer of The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG), will be speaking at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference on February 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The live audio webcast can be accessed by media and investors at www.pginvestor.com starting at the same time. The webcast will also be accessible for replay. P&G, a leading company, offers a robust portfolio to consumers worldwide.

news.headline: OpenSea introduces OS2 for token trading, with a revamped platform and $SEA token from OpenSea Foundation.
news.summary: OpenSea has introduced a redesigned platform that now includes token trading. The new interface, developed from scratch, offers a range of features catering to both casual collectors and experienced users. The OpenSea Foundation has also launched the $SEA token to enhance engagement within their platform.

news.headline: International Paper announces closure of 4 facilities in Campti, Phoenix, Hazleton, and St. Louis.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, International Paper disclosed the permanent closure of several facilities. The closures include the Red River containerboard mill in Campti, Louisiana, a recycling plant in Phoenix, Arizona, a box plant in Hazleton, Pennsylvania, and a sheet feeder facility in St. Louis. International Paper is listed on the New York Stock Exchange as IP and on the London Stock Exchange as IPC.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance Corporation plans to offer $400.0 million in senior notes due 2030 to fund the redemption of $400.0 million outstanding 6.625% senior notes due 2026.
news.summary: Southfield, Michigan – On February 13, 2025, Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) announced its plan to offer $400.0 million in senior notes due 2030. The company aims to utilize the net proceeds from this offering, combined with available cash, to redeem all $400.0 million of its 6.625% senior notes due 2026. This action aligns with the terms outlined in the indenture governing the 2026 notes, and will also cover associated fees and expenses. While awaiting the redemption process, any remaining net proceeds may be directed towards short-term investments or repaying borrowings under the revolving credit facility, with no impact on the lenders' commitments.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) wins industry awards from Bankrate, GOBankingRates, Newsweek in finance sector.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI), the parent company of Texas Capital, has been honored with prestigious awards from Bankrate, GOBankingRates, and Newsweek for its outstanding performance in financial services. The recognition signifies the company's dedication to delivering high-quality financial products and solutions to its clients. These accolades reinforce Texas Capital's position as the leading full-service financial services entity based in Texas.

news.headline: SJW Group will announce Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 26.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has risen to 6.1%, marking an increase of 0.1% compared to last year. The number of unemployed individuals worldwide now stands at a staggering 205 million. The youth have been particularly affected, with 71 million individuals aged 15-24 currently unemployed. This data underscores the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market, exacerbated by the impact of the pandemic. Experts emphasize the need for targeted interventions to address this concerning trend and support economic recovery.

news.headline: OpenSea giving out SEA tokens to NFT traders as platform expands. Current and past users eligible for airdrop.
news.summary: As OpenSea's platform reopens for fungible token trading, both current and past users will have the opportunity to receive SEA. The platform has seen a significant number of users over time and this relaunch is expected to attract even more participants.

news.headline: Richard Webber of CertaPro Painters of Morristown, NJ wins 2024 IFA Franchisee of the Year. LAS VEGAS, Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Morristown, NJ, Richard Webber, the owner of CertaPro Painters, was awarded the prestigious title of 2024 Franchisee of the Year by the International Franchise Association (IFA). This recognition was given in Las Vegas on February 13, 2025. Webber's exceptional performance in franchising earned him this honor, showcasing his dedication and success in the industry.

news.headline: Royal Credit Union chooses Alogent's Unify Platform for efficiency, with $5.3 billion in assets. #banking #efficiency #technology
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Alogent, a prominent software company specializing in banking and financial services, revealed through social media that Royal Credit Union, based in Eau Claire, WI, with assets exceeding $5.3 billion, has chosen their services.

news.headline: US Renal Care launches "The Nightingale Program" to help team members become nephrology nurses. Industry-leading initiative.
news.summary: "The Nightingale Program" offers significant advantages to healthcare providers seeking career advancement opportunities. Taking place in Plano, Texas, as of February 13, 2025, this program is hosted by U.S. Renal Care (USRC), recognized as the top dialysis provider with remarkable growth rates nationwide and exceptional standards in clinical care and patient satisfaction.

news.headline: U.S. product recalls hit second-highest in 6 years with over 3,200 events in 2024 - Sedgwick analysis.
news.summary: Sedgwick brand protection recently published a comprehensive analysis of recall data from 2024. The report reveals that the United States experienced over 3,200 product recalls for the second year in a row. This indicates a persistent high level of recall activity in the country. The analysis was released from Memphis, Tennessee on Feb. 13, 2025, by Sedgwick brand protection.

news.headline: 2024 CEO Pinnacle Awards winners announced by Chief Executives Council after a judging process starting in October 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 13, 2025, the recipients of the 2024 CEO Pinnacle™ Awards were announced following a thorough evaluation that commenced in October 2024. These awards, organized by the Chief Executives Council, a prominent community and platform promoting excellence in business leadership, aim to recognize outstanding individuals in the industry.

news.headline: Jan de Leon named new President & CEO of TÜV SÜD Americas, effective Feb 1, 2025, replacing Dr. Fabian Schober.
news.summary: Jan de Leon has been named as President & CEO of the Americas region for TÜV SÜD starting February 1, 2025. He will be based in Wakefield, Massachusetts and will be overseeing the growth, innovation, and strategic development of the region. He takes over from Dr. Fabian Schober, who recently departed from the company. With a background in finance, strategy, and business transformation, Jan de Leon has shown strong leadership skills since he joined in 2018.

news.headline: MDCE / Infinite Auctions has amassed a multi-million dollar inventory of sports memorabilia from iconic players like LeBron, Kobe, Iverson, and Jordan.
news.summary: A company based in Mesa, Arizona, known as Medical Care Technologies Inc. and Infinite Auctions, has assembled a valuable inventory worth millions of dollars. This collection consists of game-used memorabilia from renowned sports figures including LeBron James, Kobe Bryant, Allen Iverson, and Michael Jordan. The company's stock is listed as OTC PINK: MDCE.

news.headline: Gen Digital Inc. plans to offer $1.1 billion in senior notes to support Digital Freedom.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona and Prague, on February 13, 2025, Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN), a prominent global company focused on promoting Digital Freedom through various consumer brands, disclosed its intention to offer $1,100 million in senior notes due for sale.

news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. announces breakthrough in optimizing quantum computing using DeepSeek model.- Company: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO)- Date: Feb. 13, 2025- Location: SHENZHEN, China
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 13, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) unveiled their latest innovation, the DeepSeek model, signaling a significant advancement in digital simulated technology. The technology service provider has made a notable breakthrough in this field, expanding their capabilities to offer more intricate and immersive experiences. This development highlights the company's commitment to pushing boundaries and enhancing their offerings.

news.headline: Greenwald Davidson Radbil PLLC secures $55 million for consumers from unwanted robocalls in the past 6 months.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, as of February 13, 2025, boutique law firm Greenwald Davidson Radbil PLLC has successfully helped consumers in Boca Raton and Austin receive over $55 million in the last half-year due to unwanted robocalls. Through class action settlements, the firm has been able to secure compensation for individuals impacted by these illegal calls.

news.headline: Mintify acquires Magically.gg to expand digital asset ecosystem, marking first major acquisition. Merging brands for consumer applications growth.
news.summary: In a recent development, Mintify, a leading platform for onchain trading, has successfully completed the acquisition of Magically.gg from Redacted. This strategic move marks Mintify's inaugural major acquisition as part of its expansion strategy to enhance its brand and infrastructure with a stronger focus on consumer-oriented applications. Through this acquisition, Mintify adds a significant player in digital asset trading to its portfolio, further enriching its ecosystem of onchain offerings for consumers. This acquisition underscores Mintify's commitment to growing and diversifying its range of products and services.

news.headline: Regions Bank introduces Regions Embedded ERP Finance to assist Treasury Management clients in optimizing cash flow, liquidity, and reducing risks. Powered by Koxa, this tool connects financial data to ERP systems, allowing better anticipation of business needs.
news.summary: Regions Bank unveiled a new tool called Regions Embedded ERP Finance aimed at assisting Treasury Management customers in enhancing cash flow management, liquidity optimization, risk reduction, and forecasting business requirements. By teaming up with Koxa, this solution enables clients to efficiently link financial information with their enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. This integration offers improved insight into financial data and business processes. This move signifies Regions Bank's commitment to providing innovative solutions for its customers, further solidifying its position as a leader in the finance sector.
